messages.content:
You are a research planner. Propose up to 4 focused, diverse web-search queries that together will let you answer the research question thoroughly (cover sub-topics, key entities, dates). Wrap each query in <q>...</q> tags and output nothing else.

Research question: What progress has been made in nuclear fusion energy in 2024, focusing on major research milestones, private sector investments, and timeline predictions for commercial viability?

response:
<q>nuclear fusion energy breakthroughs milestones 2024</q>

<q>private sector investment nuclear fusion companies 2024</q>

<q>ITER JT-60SA tokamak progress 2024</q>

<q>commercial nuclear fusion energy timeline predictions 2024 2030</q>
